title: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide

'''''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' was the official [[Prima Games]] guide to ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.

==Publisher's summary==
'''Engage in a Golden Age Saga'''
*Strategies for fighting and equipment usage
*Exclusive maps for every level, from ''[[Endar Spire]]'' to the [[Battle of Rakata Prime|climactic final battle]]
*Strategies for each character class
*Details on every NPC and party member
*Complete strategies for the card game [[Pazaak/Legends|Pazaak]]
*Comprehensive item, power-up, and weapon lists
*Complete walkthrough from [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*Tips for resisting (or receiving) the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]!
*All puzzle solutions, minigames, and side quests revealed

{{Book-stub}}
